SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen

Interface CtlDslVisitor<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
CtlDslBaseVisitor
public interface CtlDslVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    visitAdditiveExpr(CtlDslParser.AdditiveExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.additiveExpr().
    T
    visitAdditiveOp(CtlDslParser.AdditiveOpContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.additiveOp().
    T
    visitAfExpr(CtlDslParser.AfExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the AfExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.unaryExpr().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by the AgExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.unaryExpr().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.andExpr().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.atom().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by the AtomExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.quantExpr().
    T
    visitAuExpr(CtlDslParser.AuExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the AuExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.quantExpr().
    T
    visitAxExpr(CtlDslParser.AxExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the AxExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.unaryExpr().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by the BoolLitExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.primaryArith().

    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by the NegArithExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.primaryArith().
    T
    visitNotExpr(CtlDslParser.NotExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the NotExpr labeled alternative in CtlDslParser.unaryExpr().
    T
    visitOrExpr(CtlDslParser.OrExprContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.orExpr().
